== Notes for [[Item:Q105875|Q105875]] ==

* Wilaadat (Birth): 52 AH (672 AD)
* Wafaat (Death): 20th ZilHajja 60 AH (23rd September 680 AD)

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Muhammad_ibn_Muslim_and_Ibraheem_ibn_Muslim

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000017701096493

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
